holdings.infoBox: CNYA is an equity ETF with a total of 416 individual holdings. The top holdings are Contemporary Amperex Technology stock at 3.38%, Kweichow Moutai at 2.99%, Zhongji Innolight at 2.71%, Cambricon Technologies Corporation at 1.59%, and China Merchants Bank at 1.52%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI China A ETF (CNYA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI China A Inclusion index, a market-cap-weighted index of Chinese A-share equities. CNYA was launched on Jun 13, 2016 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: There Will Be Investing Opportunities When the Strait of Hormuz Reopens. Think ETFs.
data.text: The war's end would help China. Two quick ways to tap Chinese stocks: the iShares MSCI China ETF and the iShares MSCI China A-shares ETF.

data.title: China ETFs jump as economic data hits decade high
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to China rallied Tuesday after a reading of factory activity in the country rose to its highest since Nov. 2010. Overnight, a report showed that the Caixin/Markit M...

data.title: China and Tesla: Here's what's hot in the ETF space right now
data.text: China- and Tesla-based exchange-traded funds are gaining traction, and the managers behind them see more room for growth.
